WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / WEEK 1 / ASSIGNMENT
HOW TO USE THIS PDF
• 	The first time you open this PDF (from the link in the email, it will open
in your browser
• 	Do not attempt to fill out the PDF in your browser; it will not save
• 	Instead, download the file to your own computer
• 	Then, open the file using a PDF reader
• 	Fill out the PDF (answer the questions under Step #1 on the next
page), then click Save
• 	Follow the instructions (under Step #2 on the next page) to post your
work to the Facebook group.
